basic_details.job_title: NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Staff Nurse, Helper and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in Psychology / Social Work Or MBA from RCI recognized institute, GNM or above from Govt. recognized institution, ANM from a recognized Govt. institution, B.Ed (Hearing Impaired) from recognised university /RCI institute, Diploma in hearing, language and speech (DHLS) from RCI recognised institute, Diploma in training young deaf and hearing handicap (DTYDHH) from RCI recognised institute, Class VIII or above
qualification.details: RKSK Consultant: Master Degree in Psychology / Social Work Or MBA from RCI recognized institute. Dental Hygienist: GNM or above from Govt. recognized institution. Staff Nurse: GNM or above from Govt. recognized institution. Audiometric Assistant: B.Ed (Hearing Impaired) from recognised university /RCI institute or 1 year diploma in hearing, language and speech (DHLS) from RCI recognised institute or Diploma in training young deaf and hearing handicap (DTYDHH) from RCI recognised institute. Health Worker: ANM from a recognized Govt. institution. Helper: Male with 2-wheeler valid License and Class VIII or above from recognized institution.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NHM Mizoram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nhmmizoram.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NHM Mizoram Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026 is 03 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for various posts under the National Health Mission, Mizoram for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the RKSK Consultant post?
faq.answer: For the RKSK Consultant post, candidates must possess a Master Degree in Psychology / Social Work or an MBA from an RCI recognized institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 100/- for all categories, including General/OBC and SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026 typically involves a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can download the official notification and application form from the official website of NHM Mizoram, the link for which is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The job type for the NHM Mizoram Recruitment 2026 is contract-based employment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of NHM Mizoram?
faq.answer: The official website of National Health Mission, Mizoram is https://nhmmizoram.org.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific requirements for the Helper post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Helper post, candidates must be male, possess a 2-wheeler valid license, and have completed Class VIII or above from a recognized institution.
